storyboard.content: I have been feeling very anxious and on edge for the past couple of months.
This has been going on for about 2 months and is gradually getting worse.
I have trouble sleeping and my mind races at night.
I have been having heart palpitations and sweating more than usual.
The anxiety is affecting my work performance and daily life significantly.
I am a 32-year-old woman and I went through a stressful job change about 3 months ago.
I worry constantly about things that did not used to bother me.
